name: Brave to Love
overview: Five close friends—Cheng Mei, Gua Ju, Qu Shou, Xing Hua, and Song Gang—navigate love, heartbreak, and the growing pains of adulthood as they confront real-world challenges like workplace bullying, same-sex relationships, and gender roles.

trailers.title: Brave to Love 爱情白皮书 Official Trailer
